title: [Red Forest, Derelict Village]
description: At the furthest edge of the village, a small field spreads out in an almost spherical shape.  The field is primarily matted dirt with patches of brownish-yellow grass sprouting here and there.  Some crude wooden pens sit empty in a row behind a weathered old outhouse.  Beyond the stretch of the field, a great wall of trees rises up as ancient oak sentinels.

wayto.24730: ;e result = nil;until result =~ /Obvious paths: east, southwest/;fput "stand" until standing?;result = dothistimeout "go fog", 5, /You attempt to navigate your way through the fog, but get turned around and come right back out where you started!|Obvious paths: east, southwest/;if result =~ /You attempt to navigate your way through the fog, but get turned around and come right back out where you started!/;sleep 0.5;waitrt?;end;end
